retry_reason: kref_put is unconditional when node is non-NULL; retrying would risk double-put and use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put-wrapper for batadv_gw_node that releases a reference by calling kref_put. If the reference count reaches zero, the batadv_gw_node_release callback is invoked to free the object. The function safely handles NULL input (no-op). After calling this function, the caller must not access the gw_node object as it may have been freed. This function does not return any value and always succeeds when given a valid pointer.
